channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Better Nails
item.description: Never thought of using higher quality metals for nails? Better metals now yields more nails.

item.title: TFK Player Lib Patch
item.description: Patches PlayerModelLib color swatches into a wheel layout.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Seraph Atelier - Player Model Lib
item.description: Look cute while you do pottery, starve, and get hunted by horrors beyond comprehension!

item.title: Spaturno and Trini's Secure Shelter
item.description: Shared extradimensional cottage inspired from D&D spell Leomund's Secure Shelter.

item.title: Better Hoe
item.description: Adds function to create paths with the hoe.

item.title: Astria Porta Sounds
item.description: Adds Stargate sounds to Astria Porta's Stargates

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Force Ground Storage
item.description: Almost any item that can be ground-stored cannot be stored in containers.

item.title: Water Wheel works with The Rivers Mod Mod Fix
item.description: Fixes the 'Water Wheel works with The Rivers Mod' mod by tweaking the way it calculates torque.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: ClimateScalePatch
item.description: ClimateScalePatch modifies climate map generation during worldgen.

item.title: SoldierSpy - Craftworks
item.description: Simple equipment expansion, made with love & pain, no AI

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Biomes
item.description: All biomes/bioregions in one world

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Equus: Mustang Colors
item.description: Makes equus ferus horses look more like mustangs

item.title: Fishy Bucket
item.description: Catch a fish with an empty wooden bucket, then release it alive at a different location.

item.title: Talonborne
item.description: Rideable Flying Hippogryphs — Hatch wild nest eggs and raise your own sky mount.

item.title: Metals of Myths [ALPHA]
item.description: An addon for Improved Metallurgy that extends progression even further by adding fantasy metals.

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: Antique Harmony | Music Additions / Alternative Soundtrack
item.description: Adds to/replaces soundtrack with original orchestral one, written for the game.

item.title: IndustrialStory
item.description: Overhauls metalworking, chemistry, and glassworking.

item.title: The Gravestones Mod - 1.22.3
item.description: Adds a gravestone which stores the players inventory upon death and can be retrieved by them later.

item.title: vanilla armory classic
item.description: vanilla armory but restored to just being a cut content mod

item.title: Still Useful Stuff (1.22 Fork)
item.description: Continuation of Stahl's continuation of jakecool19's' Useful Stuff.
